subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad, O thou who hast migrated! The True One—exalted be His glory—hath forsaken His homeland and chosen exile, that this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد یا ایها المهاجر حق جل جلاله وطن را گذارد و غربت اختیار نمود تا این
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @purpose; goal of creation, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
